grades.expectation: Response mentions regularisation as an option (retrospective local authority approval)
grades.reason: Clearly explains regularisation process including applying to local authority for retrospective approval

grades.expectation: Response mentions indemnity insurance as an alternative
grades.reason: Discusses indemnity insurance as Option B alternative to regularisation

grades.expectation: Response states indemnity insurance must be obtained BEFORE any approach to the local authority
grades.reason: Explicitly states 'indemnity insurance is no longer an option' if local authority contacted and 'only available if no one has contacted the local authority'

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part B (fire safety) as a key concern for loft conversions
grades.reason: Specifically mentions 'critical fire safety regulations (Part B)' and notes lenders take this seriously

grades.expectation: Response provides approximate costs for at least one option (regularisation £400-800 or insurance £50-200)
grades.reason: Provides costs for both options: regularisation £400-800 and indemnity insurance £50-200
